text.title: Auto Rollback Policy Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Can quality score be computed in < 10 min of inference?

conclusion.verdict: skip auto-rollback; rely on manual override + canary ratio for blast-radius control

branch.question: Is the feature high-risk (financial, health, legal)?

text.example: measurable=true → q-risk: low → standard ladder; thresholds 5/10/50; rolling window 200 inferences / 10 min.
